notes: FAIL_SSN -> ESCALATE_SSN; park PENDING (no LexisNexis call on first fail).
FAIL_ADDRESS -> ESCALATE_ADDRESS; /resume new address -> re-run IDology PASS. IDology=2.
FAIL_NAME -> ESCALATE_FULL_NAME; resume -> re-run IDology PASS.
Unmapped code -> catch-all FAIL -> route to LexisNexis -> PASS.
Multi-category -> ESCALATE_PII; resume both fields -> re-run PASS.
ITIN code -> FAIL_SSN -> ESCALATE_SSN (different SSN sub-code).
CVI&NAP pass, NAS=2<9 -> NAS-driven SSN fail (different values than CVI-driven LN-SSN-2)
CVI&NAP pass, NAS=7<9 -> NAS-driven non-SSN fail
Hard-block present even though CVI/NAP/NAS would PASS -> precedence
ESCALATE_FULL_NAME: /resume changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology PASS.
ESCALATE_FULL_NAME: /resume same value -> SAME_INPUT -> re-run still fails -> FAILED.
ESCALATE_SSN: /resume changed field -> DIFFERENT_INPUT -> re-run IDology PASS.
ESCALATE_SSN: /resume same value -> SAME_INPUT -> re-run still fails -> FAILED.

ESCALATE_DOB: /resume same value -> SAME_INPUT -> re-run still fails -> FAILED.

ESCALATE_ADDRESS: /resume same value -> SAME_INPUT -> re-run still fails -> FAILED.

LN SSN fail -> Persona pass -> SSN esc; /resume same SSN -> Decline.
SSN esc different -> /resume -> re-run IDology PASS. IDology=2.
IDology FAIL_SSN -> PII esc -> /resume -> re-run PASS.
PII esc -> resume -> re-run IDology fail -> LexisNexis pass.
Persona async create -> PENDING -> /resume verified -> PASSED.
Replay same flow_id 3x -> idempotent single effect.
USM returns no params -> still missing -> ERROR.
Async provider -> park PENDING (no resume in this case).
VALIDATED: valid envelope -> 200 {data.flow_id}, error=null -> async PASSED.
Duplicate flow_id 2nd call -> 400 KYC_FLOW_COMPLETED (or IN_PROGRESS if 1st still running); one uks_kyc_flow row.
kyc_type with no active flow graph -> 400 FLOW_GRAPH_INACTIVE.

Experiment service timeout -> swallowed in HandleInitiate (returns None,None) -> fall back to default DM flow graph -> IDology PASS -> PASSED. (Assumes EXPERIMENT_SERVICE_URL points at the mock so get_treatment is seeded; if DM has no ExperimentConfig the experiment path is skipped and the outcome is identical.)

Experiment service 5xx -> swallowed in HandleInitiate (returns None,None) -> fall back to default DM flow graph -> IDology PASS -> PASSED. (Assumes EXPERIMENT_SERVICE_URL points at the mock so get_treatment is seeded; if DM has no ExperimentConfig the experiment path is skipped and the outcome is identical.)

Experiment service error body -> swallowed in HandleInitiate (returns None,None) -> fall back to default DM flow graph -> IDology PASS -> PASSED. (Assumes EXPERIMENT_SERVICE_URL points at the mock so get_treatment is seeded; if DM has no ExperimentConfig the experiment path is skipped and the outcome is identical.)
Slow ~25s < 30s cap -> PASS (boundary max). Contrast IDO-13.
LexisNexis slow but under timeout -> PASS.
Persona create slow but under timeout -> 201 -> resume -> PASSED.
USM 5xx on data fetch → flow ERROR.
USM timeout on data fetch → flow ERROR.
USM 404 user not found → flow ERROR.
IDology 5xx on all retry attempts → ERROR.
IDology FAIL → LN 5xx retry → LN PASS → KYC PASS.
IDology FAIL → LN 5xx all retries → ERROR.
